PreToolUse.hook: FILEPATH="$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // ""')"; FILENAME="$(basename "$FILEPATH")"; if [ "$FILENAME" = "eslint.config.mjs" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Modifying eslint.config.mjs is forbidden. If a rule makes your task impossible, report to the user and explain why."}'; else echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; fi
